killCriteria: Backend, API, or database (for the free tool)
decisionTest: Does this help someone export or print their schedule in under 60 seconds? If no → skip it, or build it behind a feature flag for later.

features.title: Preset selection
features.description: Three built-in starter presets (Homeowner's Sentinel, Preventive Gearhead, Automated CFO) plus user-saved custom presets. Active preset resolves with legacy ID mapping and fallback.

acceptanceTests.description: Legacy preset IDs map to current preset keys
acceptanceTests.verify: vitest:resolveActivePreset maps legacy ids

acceptanceTests.description: Missing or invalid preset falls back to a valid default
acceptanceTests.verify: vitest:resolveActivePreset falls back when preset missing

acceptanceTests.description: User can select a built-in or custom preset in the one-page UI
acceptanceTests.verify: manual:Open app, click each preset card, confirm tasks load and active preset persists after reload

acceptanceTests.description: E2E selects Preventive Gearhead preset and confirms active view label
acceptanceTests.verify: e2e:schedule-flow preset switch

features.title: ICS calendar export
features.description: Generate RFC 5545 `.ics` files from recurring tasks for import into calendar apps. Core export stays free forever.

acceptanceTests.description: Empty task list returns null (no file generated)
acceptanceTests.verify: vitest:buildIcsContent returns null for empty task list

acceptanceTests.description: Events use all-day VALUE=DATE for DTSTART
acceptanceTests.verify: vitest:buildIcsContent uses all-day VALUE=DATE for DTSTART

acceptanceTests.description: Special characters in summaries are escaped per iCal rules
acceptanceTests.verify: vitest:buildIcsContent escapes special characters in summaries

acceptanceTests.description: Affiliate hints appear in descriptions when feature flag enabled
acceptanceTests.verify: vitest:buildIcsContent includes affiliate hints when enabled

acceptanceTests.description: Dates format as YYYYMMDD
acceptanceTests.verify: vitest:formatIcalDate formats as YYYYMMDD

acceptanceTests.description: Export button downloads a valid `.ics` file
acceptanceTests.verify: manual:Export calendar, import file into Apple/Google Calendar, confirm recurring events appear

acceptanceTests.description: E2E exports ICS and downloads neatclock-schedule.ics
acceptanceTests.verify: e2e:schedule-flow ICS download

acceptanceTests.description: E2E toggles print preview and asserts read-only task names (slice 14)
acceptanceTests.verify: e2e:pending print-preview

features.title: JSON backup and restore
features.description: Versioned JSON export/import of schedules, custom presets, and preferences with normalization on restore.

acceptanceTests.description: Backup payload includes version metadata
acceptanceTests.verify: vitest:backup creates a versioned payload

acceptanceTests.description: Restore normalizes tasks and active preset
acceptanceTests.verify: vitest:backup normalizes tasks and active preset

acceptanceTests.description: Invalid backup JSON is rejected
acceptanceTests.verify: vitest:backup rejects invalid backups

acceptanceTests.description: Custom preset tasks normalize on restore; empty names filtered; cap at 50
acceptanceTests.verify: vitest:backup normalizes custom preset tasks on restore

acceptanceTests.description: Full backup/restore roundtrip preserves user data
acceptanceTests.verify: manual:Customize tasks, export backup JSON, clear storage, import backup, confirm state restored

acceptanceTests.description: E2E downloads neatclock-backup.json via Backup button
acceptanceTests.verify: e2e:schedule-flow backup download

acceptanceTests.description: E2E exports backup, clears storage, imports, and restores tasks (slice 12)
acceptanceTests.verify: e2e:pending backup-roundtrip

features.title: Browser localStorage persistence
features.description: Schedules and preferences persist in browser localStorage with graceful failure when storage is unavailable or quota exceeded.

acceptanceTests.description: storageSet returns false when setItem throws
acceptanceTests.verify: vitest:storage storageSet returns false when setItem throws

acceptanceTests.description: storageGet returns fallback when getItem throws
acceptanceTests.verify: vitest:storage storageGet returns fallback when getItem throws

acceptanceTests.description: persistState invokes onFailure callback when setItem throws
acceptanceTests.verify: vitest:storage persistState invokes onFailure when setItem throws

acceptanceTests.description: State survives page reload
acceptanceTests.verify: manual:Edit tasks, reload page, confirm changes persisted

acceptanceTests.description: E2E surfaces storage failure message when localStorage quota exceeded (slice 13)
acceptanceTests.verify: e2e:pending storage-failure toast

features.title: UI theme system
features.description: Multiple app themes with validation, legacy dark-mode migration, and premium themes gated behind feature flag.

acceptanceTests.description: Valid saved theme is accepted
acceptanceTests.verify: vitest:resolveTheme accepts a valid saved theme

acceptanceTests.description: Invalid theme falls back to warm sand
acceptanceTests.verify: vitest:resolveTheme rejects invalid theme and falls back to warm sand

acceptanceTests.description: Legacy dark flag migrates to obsidian when saved theme invalid
acceptanceTests.verify: vitest:resolveTheme uses obsidian when legacy dark mode is enabled and saved theme is invalid

acceptanceTests.description: THEME_CLASSES matches resolveTheme allowlist
acceptanceTests.verify: vitest:THEME_CLASSES matches allowlist used by resolveTheme

acceptanceTests.description: Theme selector updates UI and header logo variant
acceptanceTests.verify: manual:Switch themes, confirm colors and logo swap for dark themes

acceptanceTests.description: E2E switches to dark theme and confirms light logo variant (slice 11)
acceptanceTests.verify: e2e:pending theme-swap

features.title: Task validation and normalization
features.description: Clamp intervals, normalize units, repair partial tasks, truncate long names, and parse natural-language recurrence input.

acceptanceTests.description: Interval clamped to 1–120
acceptanceTests.verify: vitest:clampInterval clamps to 1–120

acceptanceTests.description: Invalid units coerced to months
acceptanceTests.verify: vitest:normalizeUnit accepts valid units only

acceptanceTests.description: Partial task objects are repaired with defaults
acceptanceTests.verify: vitest:normalizeTask repairs partial tasks

acceptanceTests.description: Very long task names are truncated
acceptanceTests.verify: vitest:normalizeTask truncates very long names

acceptanceTests.description: Natural language input parses recurrence (e.g. every N months)
acceptanceTests.verify: vitest:parseNaturalLanguage parses every N months

features.title: Feature-flagged monetization
features.description: Optional revenue features (prints, lockscreen, premium themes, sponsor footer, affiliate hints) built but hidden until VITE_FEATURE_* env vars enabled. No UI shown when flags off.

acceptanceTests.description: Production with all flags off shows no monetization UI
acceptanceTests.verify: manual:Visit production URL without ?preview=monetization, confirm no print/sponsor CTAs

acceptanceTests.description: Owner preview via ?preview=monetization shows gated UI locally
acceptanceTests.verify: manual:Append ?preview=monetization to URL, confirm print cards and upsell UI visible

acceptanceTests.description: Affiliate hints in ICS when VITE_FEATURE_AFFILIATE_LINKS enabled
acceptanceTests.verify: vitest:buildIcsContent includes affiliate hints when enabled

acceptanceTests.description: Enabling flag on host and redeploying unlocks feature without code change
acceptanceTests.verify: manual:Set VITE_FEATURE_NEATCLOCK_PRINTS=true on Vercel, redeploy, confirm print CTAs appear

features.title: Print demand interest form
features.description: Native in-app modal and footer card to capture print-pack interest via Formspree/FormSubmit endpoint. Hidden once prints go live.

acceptanceTests.description: Interest UI hidden when VITE_INTEREST_FORM_ENDPOINT unset
acceptanceTests.verify: manual:Production without endpoint configured — no interest modal or footer card

acceptanceTests.description: Interest UI appears when endpoint configured and prints flag off
acceptanceTests.verify: manual:Set VITE_INTEREST_FORM_ENDPOINT, redeploy, confirm modal and footer card visible

acceptanceTests.description: Form submission reaches configured endpoint
acceptanceTests.verify: manual:Submit test entry, verify receipt in Formspree/FormSubmit inbox

acceptanceTests.description: Interest UI hidden when VITE_FEATURE_NEATCLOCK_PRINTS enabled
acceptanceTests.verify: manual:Enable prints flag, confirm interest form no longer shown

features.title: Brand assets and OG metadata
features.description: Transparent PNG logos (light/dark variants), favicons, PWA icons, OG image, and lockscreen wallpaper in public/. Source assets in design-system/brand-assets/.

acceptanceTests.description: Logo PNGs with transparency served from /public
acceptanceTests.verify: manual:Confirm /logo.png and /logo-light.png load with transparent backgrounds

acceptanceTests.description: Favicon and apple-touch-icon present
acceptanceTests.verify: manual:Check browser tab icon and bookmark icon on mobile

acceptanceTests.description: OG image available for social sharing
acceptanceTests.verify: manual:Share URL in Slack/iMessage, confirm og-image.png preview

acceptanceTests.description: Header swaps logo variant for dark themes
acceptanceTests.verify: manual:Switch to Obsidian theme, confirm light logo variant displayed

acceptanceTests.description: E2E confirms header logo variant swaps on dark theme (slice 11)
acceptanceTests.verify: e2e:pending theme-swap logo variant

features.title: NeatClock Prints (Gumroad)
features.description: Premium PDF print packs ($5 each, $12 bundle) linked from export success modal and footer. Requires Gumroad products, ZIP deliverables, and VITE_FEATURE_NEATCLOCK_PRINTS.

acceptanceTests.description: Print CTAs hidden in production until flag and URLs configured
acceptanceTests.verify: manual:Production — no Gumroad links on export success modal

acceptanceTests.description: Export modal shows preset-specific print pack copy
acceptanceTests.verify: manual:With flag on and URLs set, export from Gearhead preset, confirm garage-ready CTA copy

acceptanceTests.description: Each preset links to correct Gumroad product URL
acceptanceTests.verify: manual:Click print CTA for each preset, confirm correct Gumroad product opens

acceptanceTests.description: Bundle option links to all-three pack
acceptanceTests.verify: manual:Confirm bundle CTA uses VITE_PRINTS_BUNDLE_URL
